framework.name: AP2 solves accountability not just auth
framework.description: The real problem AP2 addresses isn't authentication — it's dispute resolution. When an agent buys the wrong thing, who's liable? AP2's tamper-evident audit trails give issuers/merchants/networks shared evidence. This reframes agent payments from a tech problem to a liability problem.
framework.raw_quote: If something goes wrong, who is responsible—the user, the agent developer, the merchant, or the issuer?
